name: memory-recall
description: Smart memory recall with three backends: path reminder, agentic search (Haiku), or embedding RAG. Automatically injects relevant memory content on every user prompt.

backend.title: Search Backend
backend.description: Which backend to use: 'reminder' (just paths), 'agentic' (Haiku selects files), or 'embedding' (local RAG daemon)

context_messages.title: Context Messages
context_messages.description: Number of recent conversation messages to include for search context

context_max_chars.title: Context Max Chars
context_max_chars.description: Maximum characters of conversation context to send
